headline: APA (APA) Is Sending 60% Of Free Cash Flow Back To Investors
summary: APA Corporation (NasdaqGS:APA) is emphasizing a capital return framework that targets at least 60% of free cash flow to investors through dividends and share buybacks. The company is pairing this with ongoing debt reduction efforts and funding for large projects, including the GranMorgu oil development in Suriname. This combination of capital returns, balance sheet focus, and project build out reflects a material shift in how APA is prioritizing and deploying its cash flows. APA is drawing...

headline: APA Corporation (APA) Upgraded at Roth Capital. Here is Why
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 2.99%, APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA) is included among the 12 Best NASDAQ Stocks to Buy for Dividends. APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA) is an independent energy company that explores for, develops, and produces natural gas, crude oil, and natural gas liquids.
